name: Distorted Illusions
short_description: Distorted Illusions is a free and relaxing block puzzle game featuring 2 modes, 6 puzzles, and many environments. Upgrade to Distorted Illusions Premium for more puzzles, difficulties up to 12x12, and the ability to import your own puzzles!
detailed_description:
Distorted Illusions is a free and relaxing block puzzle game.

Distorted Illusions Free features:
- 2 game modes (Block Slide and Block Swap)
- 3x3 puzzle difficulty for both game modes
- Leaderboards based on least number of moves
- 6 different puzzles
- 8 relaxing music tracks
- 65 achievements

Distorted Illusions Premium features:
- 40+ different puzzles
- Puzzle difficulties 3x3 to 12x12 for both game modes
- Import your own custom puzzles

Planned for the future:
- More puzzles
- More achievements
- More environments
- Visibility of raw leaderboards
- Better controller support
